meta.sourcePolicy: Publish real attraction leads with an explicit status. Do not present candidate or archived records as current schedules, prices, access, or owner-approved listings.
meta.instructions: Add hours, fees, contacts, images, and booking links only after checking the current responsible owner or government source. Keep a source and last-checked date with every record.

establishments.name: Sampaguita Festival
establishments.description: San Pedro's signature citywide celebration connects sampaguita, community, culture, trade fairs, parades, and the Hiyas ng San Pedro program. Current dates require a new official schedule.

establishments.name: Lolo Uweng Shrine
establishments.description: The Diocesan Shrine of Jesus in the Holy Sepulchre, known locally as Lolo Uweng, is identified in a national infrastructure reference as a major religious and cultural draw. Parish confirmation is still needed.

establishments.name: San Pedro Apostol Parish Church
establishments.description: A potential heritage and civic-life stop near the city center. Current visiting information and any heritage designation need parish or diocese confirmation.

establishments.name: Laurel Museum and Garden
establishments.location: San Pedro, Laguna; exact visitor details to confirm
establishments.description: A museum and garden connected with the Laurel family and local historical memory. Opening status, ownership, and access must be confirmed before promotion.

establishments.name: Risen Christ Statue
establishments.location: San Pedro / Laguna Lake area; exact location to confirm
establishments.description: A landmark identified in the DPWH tourism and development reference. Exact location, access, and maintenance information need current confirmation.

establishments.name: St. Peter the Apostle Statue
establishments.location: Laguna Lake area; exact location to confirm
establishments.description: A San Pedro landmark listed in the DPWH reference as part of a potential tourism circuit. Location, public access, and current condition require local verification.

establishments.name: KC Filipinas Golf Club
establishments.description: A golf and recreation venue identified in tourism references. Membership, visitor policies, fees, and operating details must come from the venue.

establishments.name: Laguna Lakeside Boat Club
establishments.description: A San Pedro-based dragon boat team and lakeside community recognized by the City Government for 2025 national competition results. This is not a promise of public boat tours.

establishments.name: Sampaguita and local products
establishments.description: Sampaguita growing, lei-making, native food, and older local industries are part of San Pedro's tourism story. Producer profiles require direct confirmation and consent.

establishments.name: Tourism, Culture and Arts Office
establishments.description: The official city office responsible for tourism, culture, and arts programs. Its Citizen's Charter is the first place to verify city-led activities and transactions.

establishments.name: San Pedro Cultural Mapping Project
establishments.description: An official city cultural-mapping reference that can grow this directory toward barangay stories, practices, and heritage assets.
